task_description: Report generation — 4-page PDF report summarizing all findings
student_modification: This was a collaborative effort between the student (Meghavi) and Claude. The student provided the research plan, design decisions, and paper understanding. Claude assisted with code generation following the student's specifications. The student reviewed, verified, and validated all outputs against the original paper.

interactions.purpose: Generate a PDF report using fpdf2 summarizing all Part B findings
interactions.prompt_summary: Asked Claude Code to create generate_report.py using fpdf2 to produce a 4-page report with sections: paper summary, reproduction setup and results, ablation findings, failure mode, and reflection
interactions.how_it_helped: Collaborative effort: Generated the complete report generation script with proper formatting, section headers, and content covering all required topics

student_verification: Collaborative verification: Reviewed all report content for factual accuracy. Verified paper summary matches the original paper. Confirmed reproduction description matches the actual implementation. Verified ablation and failure mode descriptions are consistent with notebook outputs.

declaration.statement: I declare this is a complete and honest record of LLM usage for Task 4.1. This work was a collaborative effort between the student (Meghavi, 230044) and Claude (claude-opus-4-6). The student provided the research direction, paper understanding, and design decisions. Claude assisted with implementation, structuring, and articulation.

top_5_prompts.prompt: Generate a PDF report using fpdf2 with sections covering paper summary, reproduction results, ablation findings, failure mode, and reflection — maximum 4 pages
top_5_prompts.why_important: The report synthesizes all findings into a coherent document that demonstrates understanding of the paper and the experimental results
